name: Peanut Butter & Chocolate Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a bowl, combine butter, peanut butter, packed brown sugar, 1/4 cup granulated sugar, egg, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix until light and fluffy.
3. Add flour and baking soda; mix until fully blended.
4. Shape dough into 48 balls.
5. Roll each ball in 3 tablespoons granulated sugar.
6. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden.
8. Remove from the oven and immediately top each cookie with a chocolate kiss. Press down firmly to secure the kiss in place.
9. Allow cookies to cool completely before serving.
